name: global-dengue-case-database-by-country-1995-2024
title: Database of confirmed and reported dengue cases in 31 countries across Latin America, South Asia, and Southeast Asia, with time series from 1995 to 2024. Data compiled from PAHO/WHO and national health ministries.
